channel.title: Poetic Codes | Technical Documentation
channel.description: Professional Python OOP tutorials and web development insights by Glenn Junsay Pansensoy.

item.title: Mastering Python OOP: The Four Pillars
item.dc:creator: Glenn Junsay Pansensoy
item.description: A high-density guide covering Inheritance, Encapsulation, Polymorphism, and Abstraction in Python.
